source_metadata.description:
Thursday 5 March 2026 | Foreign Affairs, Defence and Trade Committee

Ministry of Defence, Manatū Kaupapa Waonga, Long-term Insights Briefing 2026

Hearing of evidence
Submitters List:
Ministry of Defence

Anton Youngman, Deputy Secretary Strategy Management & Assessment
Paul Arts, Director Strategy Management Office
